title: Pixelmon Roleplay Packs
description: Three small but simple roleplay resourcepacks for Pixelmon 1.16.5 that make certain armors and models invisible.
body:
This is a resourcepack bundle that is mostly to be used for roleplay/cosmetic purposes, each version does a different thing that will essentially let your skin show and still allow you to use the features given by pixelmon's many armor sets. It's rather simple and is simply just using a transparent texture over a lot of the current items.

Keep in mind this pack is, as with all resource packs, client side. Others will not see these items as invisible unless they have the pack on as well.

- Invisible Bracelet and Band
It makes it so when you or another player equip the Dynamax Band or the base version of the Mega Bracelet (The one from ORAS) it will not show up on your player nor the player models of others.
Affects:
ORAS Mega Bracelet
Dynamax Band

- Inviible Running Shoes
This version of the pack is a simpler version of "Invisible Pixelmon Armor (All)" which makes the item running shoes invisible when put on the player. It does not make it invisible within the inventory or GUI, however will make it disappear so you can let those boots you worked on for a while show.
Affects:
Running Shoes' Armor Texture.

- Invisible Pixelmon Armor (All)
Despite advertising a full on overhaul, it only affects certain armor pieces from Pixelmon. Those specific armor pieces are the ones made from ore, or that have some special effect. Similar to "Invisible Running Shoes", they are still visible within the GUI.
Affects:
Running Shoes Armor Texture
Thunder, Fire, Leaf, Water, Ice, Dawn, Dusk, Shiny and all "Stone" Armor Sets.
Platinum, Silver, and all other ore armor sets.
